archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) optimized for IoT Dashboards

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but readable. No wasted space.

bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-[#1a2332]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-white/10 z-50

header.style: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#1a2332]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10 px-4 h-14 flex items-center justify-between

buttons.primary: bg-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#059669] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2a384d] hover:bg-[#334155] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium border border-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: w-full bg-[#1a2332] border border-white/10 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#10B981]/50 focus:border-[#10B981] transition-all

status_pill.online: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border border-[#10B981]/20
status_pill.offline: bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border border-slate-500/20
status_pill.alert: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border border-red-500/20

charts.style: Use AreaChart with gradient fill. Water blue (#0ea5e9) for level, Eco Green (#10B981) for flow. Hide grid lines or use very subtle white/5. Monospace font for axes.

icons.usage: Use solid, clear icons. Size 24px for nav, 16px for inline metadata.

login_background.description: Dark blue water ripple background for the login screen to establish the environmental/water theme.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='device-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is the default and only theme.
Import Google Fonts: 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for headings, 'Inter' for body, and 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric readings, metrics, and chart axes.
Cards should not be purely flat; use subtle borders (border-white/10) to separate them from the base deep navy background (#1a2332).
For the bottom navigation on mobile layouts, ensure safe-area padding is applied and elements are easily tappable.
Do not use generic blue/purple gradients. Stick to the environmental palette: Deep Navy, Water Blue, and Sustainable Green.
Implement Shadcn UI components but override their default styling to match the deep navy theme.
Charts must be accessible, using Recharts with responsive containers.
Do NOT create .tsx files. Use .js or .jsx as per the project environment.
Include data-testid on every interactive element.
